<style type="text/css">
       html,body
{
background:none !important;
}
#overlay
{
Position: fixed;
z-index: 99;
top: 0px;
left: 0px;
background-color: #FFFFFF;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
filter: Alpha(Opacity=80);
opacity:0.80;
}
#theprogress{
background-color: transparent;
width: 200px;
height: 200px;
text-align: center;
filter: Alpha(Opacity=100);
opacity:1;
}
#modalprogress
{
position: absolute;
top: 50%;
left: 50%;
margin: -11px 0 0 -55px;
color: white;
}         
Body>#modalprogress
{
Position:fixed;
} 
</style>

<script type="text/javascript">

    function expand(targetDiv) {
        var html = $("[id='div_" + targetDiv + "']").html()
        if (html.indexOf('Party') < 0 && html.indexOf('Event') < 0 && html.indexOf('Status') < 0) {
            $.ajax({
                type: 'GET'
          , cache: false
          , url: 'CourtCaseDetail.aspx?ID=' + targetDiv
          , contentType: 'text/html; charset=utf-8'
          , async: false
          , success: function (html) {
              $("[id='div_" + targetDiv + "']").html(html);
          }
          , error: function (data) {
              $('#div_' + targetDiv).append("Oops! Something went wrong.");
          }
            });
        }

        if ($("[id='div_" + targetDiv + "']").css('display') == 'none') {
            $("[id='div_" + targetDiv + "']").css('display', 'block');
        }
        else {
            $("[id='div_" + targetDiv + "']").css('display', 'none');
        }
    }
</script>
